title: Chapter 1559 Chronicles of the Immortal Monarch(4)
content:
Chapter 1559 Chronicles of the Immortal Monarch(4)

1559 Chronicles of the Immortal Monarch(4)

"Well, that's all for the Immortal Monarch's journey. The rest of the scrolls seem to focus more on his companions and the places he'd visited than the person himself." Xi Meili said as she looked at the other shelves.

"Let's check out the information on the Nine Divine Supremes," he said.

Xi Meili nodded and excitedly walked to the shelf with a sign that read 'Dragon Goddess Yeyou'.

"Dragon Goddess Yeyou, one of the first dragons to exist, was also known as the Dragon of Origins. Beyond Dragon Goddess Yeyou and the other two Dragons of Origin, the exact order in which the three Dragons of Origins came into existence remains unknown."

"Although she is typically in seclusion, slumbering far away from any settlement, whenever she wakes up from it, she would always find someone to spar with, earning her the nickname of Supreme Tormentor."

"Dragon Goddess Yeyou's cultivation reached the equivalent of Cultivation God sometime past the Evil God's Era. Rumor has it that she was the first entity to reach such a profound cultivation."

"We didn't learn of this until she started traveling with the Immortal Monarch. However, she was someone who got envious easily, especially when it concerned the Immortal Monarch, and would occasionally throw tantrums."

Yuan smiled at this information and recalled the little tantrum she had thrown at the Dragon Spiral Mountain.

The scrolls went on to talk about Dragon Goddess Yeyou's history—at least the ones publically known. Due to Dragon Goddess Yeyou's seclusive nature, not much was known about her in her earlier days, especially before she met the Immortal Monarch.

According to those who fought with her, Dragon Goddess Yeyou had a remarkably simple routine: she would either slumber or spar with others. If she wasn't napping in the starry sky, she was bullying someone. If she wasn't bullying someone, she was sleeping.

After meeting the Immortal Monarch, Dragon Goddess Yeyou only slumbered whenever the Immortal Monarch entered seclusion, and she would only pick fights with those who tried to get too close to him.

It was quite obvious that Dragon Goddess Yeyou fancied the Immortal Monarch, but nobody was bold enough to say it out loud—not even the other Divine Supremes.

After spending several hours on Dragon Goddess Yeyou's information, Xi Meili went on to read about the Primordial Phoenix.

"The Primordial Phoenix was perhaps the only divine beast who walked amongst the humans before the Immortal Monarch's influence. She had her own business, selling treasures she acquired, amassing a fortune rivaling even the Great One, who was known to hoard treasures like a madman."

"The Primordial Phoenix didn't spend as much time as the others with the Immortal Monarch and only showed up occasionally whenever she got bored or was needed, like that time when the Immortal Monarch visited the Phoenix Clan."

"The Primordial Phoenix is highly competitive and is often seen butting heads with Dragon Goddess Yeyou."

Eater of Stars was next on Xi Meili's reading list, but her shelf was quite empty when compared to the others, with one exception—the ninth member of the Nine Divine Supreme.

Most of the information on the Eater of Stars was about her past before she met the Immortal Monarch. Besides Dragon Goddess Yeyou, she spent the most time with the Immortal Monarch—to the point where it was nearly impossible to see the Immortal Monarch without her somewhere around him.

"The Eater of Stars was especially protective of the Immortal Monarch. If she perceived any threat to him, no matter how minor, she would immediately become aggressive, ready to unleash her wrath on anyone who dared to harm him."

Nobody but the Nine Divine Supreme knew this, but the Immortal Monarch kept her hunger satisfied with his own blood, so it was only natural for the Eater of Stars to be protective of him since he was the reason she could live a normal life.

After finishing the scrolls on Eater of Stars, Crimson Terror was next.

"Despite the nickname he was given, Crimson Terror wasn't born a killer. In fact, he disliked violence and would always find a method to avoid it. Unfortunately, in order to protect his own clan from the greedy humans, he was forced to kill and kill until one day, he lost his mind and became nothing but a crazed killer."

"If the Immortal Monarch hadn't snapped him out of it, the Crimson Terror would've inflicted significant damage not to just human society but the beast clans, as well."

After being tamed by the Immortal Monarch, Crimson Terror traveled the world in his human form to fix the damage he'd done to the innocent.

"Up next, we have the Heavenly White Tiger God…"

Just as Xi Meili reached for a scroll, the door opened, and Xuan Kun walked inside.

"How's everything so far?" he asked them.

"I've learned a lot of new things from here, and we're just getting started," Yuan said.

"I'm glad. Anyway, I have a new guest who needs my attention, so I will not be available for a little."

"This guest must be fairly important." Xi Meili causally said.

"Yes… this individual is not only from the upper heavens, but she's also from the Immortal Clans that are closely related to the Immortal Monarch."

"Someone from the Immortal Clans?" Yuan raised an eyebrow, his interest piqued.

"Which clan is she from?"

"The Heavenly White Tiger Clan."

Yuan narrowed his eyes at this information.

'Could it be her?'

Yuan recalled the woman who showed up to protect Bai Xutao.

Xi Meili also had similar thoughts.

'For her to show up in this place, she must be looking for information…' Yuan thought to himself.

"Then, I'll let you return to your study now." Xuan Kun closed the door and went downstairs to meet this individual while Yuan and Xi Meili returned to reading scrolls.

Even if this individual turned out to be the same woman they met, they had no reason to be in her business and decided to just ignore it for the time being.
